returns._0: Array of current player addresses in the game (order 1..numberOfPlayers; holes if someone exited).

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

proxiableUUID().details: Implementation of the ERC-1822 {proxiableUUID} function. This returns the storage slot used by the implementation. It is used to validate the implementation's compatibility when performing an upgrade. IMPORTANT: A proxy pointing at a proxiable contract should not be considered proxiable itself, because this risks bricking a proxy that upgrades to it, by delegating to itself until out of gas. Thus it is critical that this function revert if invoked through a proxy. This is guaranteed by the `notDelegated` modifier.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params.newController: Pass address(0) to disable backend game controller.

setBackendPasswordFor(address,bytes32).details: Only owner or backendGameController may call this. Does not change registration or username; just sets _passwordHashOf.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes).details: Upgrade the implementation of the proxy to `newImplementation`, and subsequently execute the function call encoded in `data`. Calls {_authorizeUpgrade}. Emits an {Upgraded} event.

createGameByBackend(address,string,bytes.notice: Backend creates a game on behalf of a player. Pass either forPlayer or forUsername; passwordHash must match stored hash.

createWalletForExistingUser(address).notice: Create a smart wallet in the User Registry for a player already registered on the game but without a registry profile (e.g. registered before registry was wired).

exitGame(uint256).notice: Player voluntarily exits the game (payout by rank). Min-turns check uses on-chain turnsPlayed (backend calls setTurnCount once when player reaches threshold).

gameFaucet().notice: Game faucet (TycoonGameFaucet) is the only caller allowed to update property stats and can also submit turn counts.

initialize(address,address).notice: Initializer for proxy deployment. Call once when deploying via ERC1967Proxy.

leavePendingGame(uint256).notice: Leave a game before it starts (status still Pending). Refunds your full stake.

registerPlayerFor(address,string,bytes32.notice: Backend registers a user on behalf of an address (e.g. before they connect wallet). They get no perks until verifyAddress(signature).

registerPlayerWithoutWallet(string).notice: Register without creating smart wallet (for minipay/mobile users with direct wallet connection)

removePlayerFromGame(uint256,address,uin.notice: Backend removes a player (e.g. vote-out, stalling). Pass turnCount from your DB; if below minTurnsForPerks they get consolation only.

setBackendPasswordFor(address,bytes32).notice: Set or update backend password hash for an already-registered player so the backend can act on their behalf.

setGameFaucet(address).notice: Set game faucet (TycoonGameFaucet). Only the faucet can call setPropertyStats; faucet can also call setTurnCount.

setLogicContract(address).notice: Set logic contract for delegatecall (required for Celo / 24KB limit). Deploy TycoonUpgradeableLogic and set its address here.

setMinTurnsForPerks(uint256).notice: Set minimum turns a player must have completed to receive full perks on exit. 0 = no minimum. Applies to both voluntary exit (uses turnsPlayed) and removePlayerFromGame (uses passed turnCount).

setPropertyStats(string,string).notice: Update property sale stats (seller sold one, buyer bought one). Only callable by game faucet. Replaces transferPropertyOwnership.

setRewardSystem(address).notice: Point the game at a new reward system (e.g. after deploying one with gameMinter). Only owner.

setTurnCount(uint256,address,uint256).notice: Set a player's turn count for perk eligibility. Call once when they reach the threshold (e.g. 20). Only allows increasing. Callable by backend or game faucet.

setUserRegistry(address).notice: Set user registry (creates wallet per user, profile + email, game-action faucet). Pass address(0) to disable.

userRegistry().notice: User registry: creates wallet per user, profile (email), and game-action faucet rewards. Set via setUserRegistry.

verifyAddress(bytes).notice: Verify ownership of this address (e.g. after backend registration). Sign message: "Tycoon verify: <your address>".
